response.overview: Singer-songwriter Edwin Montoya and Ayacucho guitarist Oscar Figueroa have maintained an incredible friendship for over thirty years. During that time, they cultivated the true meaning of friendship together, sharing moments of musical creation, making history, experiencing the most challenging years, and maintaining the momentum of their partnership to create songs. After many years, they reunited to do what they love most: Ayacucho huayno music.  In their many working sessions, they decided to write a song about themselves, and without losing their characteristic style, they composed a track titled "Eternamente" (Eternally), which nostalgically summarizes many years of dedication and contribution to Ayacucho's musical culture.
response.title: Eternamente
